name: Synup Social vs. ContentStudio
hero_summary: Love using a content-first social media manager? Then you *need* to upgrade to Synup Social. While ContentStudio is a good stepping stone in your post-optimizing journey, it’s only just the beginning. Built for optimizing and creating content, Synup Social will have you smashing your engagement goals in record time. With expanded capabilities to create data-informed posts based on trends or past performance, Synup Social is the clear choice for businesses looking to up their social media game.
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_heading: Build a content calendar that works
section_2_summary: Ready to create more posts in less time? It’s possible with Synup Social. With the same beloved post recycler, custom reporting, and content suggestions, Synup ups the ante with advanced, post-by-post analytics and a smart, AI-powered post generator. Get ready to fill your content calendar in minutes!
section_2_slider_1_heading: Discover what makes your audience tick
section_2_slider_1_summary: Data-driven social media strategies get results. While ContentStudio’s analytics are lacking, Synup’s post-by-post analysis will help you understand which of your posts are evergreen. Don’t just view your metrics at-a-glance; understand the nitty-gritty details of your audience engagement.
section_2_slider_2_summary: ContentStudio is beloved for its post-creation abilities, but it’s child's play compared to what’s out there. Synup Social is a post recycling machine, helping you revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more. Plus, our AI-powered post creator means your first draft is already done. Engagement goals, sorted.
section_2_slider_3_heading: Collaboration is the name of the game
section_2_step_3_summary: Tired of getting your wires crossed? Time for a change. Synup Social unites your team, no matter its size. Whether you’re approving posts, collaborating on content, or showing clients their completed post calendar, we make it easy to manage your team (or avoid micromanaging from your boss).
section_2_slider_4_summary: ContentStudio is a solid tool for in-house teams. But for agencies and multi-location businesses, it just doesn’t fit the bill. With Synup Social, you can schedule multi-location and multi-brand posts simultaneously, managing tens (or tens of thousands) of profiles - all from one platform.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over ContentStudio?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: ContentStudio and Synup Social are both renowned for their content-driven approach to social media management. While they’re both solid tools when it comes to content creation, post optimization, and analytics, Synup takes the cake. With more features and a support team that will lay their lives on the line for you, you’ll be mad you didn’t find a ContentStudio alternative sooner. Here’s an in-depth look:
